description:
Switch from Flycheck (default) to Flymake (built into Emacs 29+). Flymake
pairs natively with Eglot (if adopted) and reduces external dependencies.

Affected file: `overlays/pkg/local/emacs-config/emacs.org` (doom! init block, line ~100)

Change: `syntax` → `(syntax +flymake)`
title: Switch syntax checker from Flycheck to Flymake
